message:
feat(db): enhanced search v3, integrity metrics, query pagination, and JSONL reconstruction

Integrity module:
- Added last_full_check_ts atomic to distinguish quick vs full integrity
  checks in metrics reporting. Full checks now record their own
  timestamp separately.
- integrity_metrics() merges runtime failure counts from global metrics
  with local counters using saturating_add for overflow safety.
- attempt_vacuum_recovery() now propagates WAL checkpoint and VACUUM
  errors instead of silently ignoring them, ensuring recovery failures
  are visible.

Queries module:
- Extended query capabilities with additional filtering, pagination
  support, and result ordering options across message and thread
  queries. Improved SQL generation for complex multi-predicate searches.

Reconstruct module:
- Enhanced JSONL reconstruction with better error recovery, progress
  tracking, and support for incremental reconstruction of partial
  archives. Added validation of reconstructed records against schema
  expectations.

Search service:
- Major expansion of search capabilities including multi-field queries,
  result ranking improvements, and configurable search scoping. Added
  search index warming and cache integration.

Search v3:
- Extended v3 search engine with support for phrase queries, field
  boosting, and result deduplication. Improved tokenization and
  relevance scoring. Added fallback paths for degraded-mode search
  when the index is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
